# Decisions

## Use JSONL for MVP storage

Context: The first milestone needs storage that agents can inspect, append, validate, and repair with simple tools.

Decision: Store each record type in an append-only JSONL file under .wikiwiki/records.

Consequences: The MVP stays simple and repo-native; update and compaction commands can be added later.

Files: `src/core/store.ts`, `src/core/schemas.ts`

Tags: `storage`, `mvp`

Record: `decision_3b942fb5-f31d-4ffb-ae25-4c3d2dfab1bd` | Authority: agent | Confidence: high
